title: The Bear's Wedding
writer: Georgiy Grebner, Anatoli Lunacharsky, Prosper Mérimée
actors: Konstantin Eggert, Aleksandra Kartseva, Yuri Zavadsky
plot: Lithuania, first half of the 19th century. While hunting on the outskirts of the ancient castle of Count Mikhail Shemet, a bear attacks the Countess. She loses her mind, and her son Casimir, born to her, acquires a pathology.
